query:
SELECT 
  id, 
  LEFT(query, 100) as query_preview,
  tier,
  qualityScore,
  cost,
  model,
  createdAt
FROM queries 
WHERE tier = 'gpt-4o-mini' AND qualityScore < 85
ORDER BY qualityScore ASC
LIMIT 50;
